cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Hello, is this Debjani Majumdar? Sir, this is Robert from the IRS. We've reviewed your tax return and you're eligible for an additional refund.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Achha, yes, this is Debjani. What's the process for receiving this refund? I'm a bit busy, ji.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: We need to verify your bank account information to process the refund electronically. It's a new security protocol, ma'am. For your HSBC account, we require the account number and routing number.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Thik hai, let me check. But can't I just verify this through my IRS online account? I'm not sure I'm comfortable sharing this information over the phone.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: I understand your concern, Debjani, but this is an urgent matter. Our system won't allow us to process the refund without this verification. And, unfortunately, our online system is currently down for maintenance.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Haan, okay. But what about my Social Security number? Do you need that as well? I'm getting a bit concerned about all these questions.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Yes, we do need the last four digits of your SSN for final verification. This is standard procedure, I assure you. We're trying to get your refund to you as quickly as possible.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Okay, fine. But can you at least give me a reference number or something so I can check on this? I want to make sure this is legitimate.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Of course, Debjani. Your reference number is... let me check... yes, it's TR1234. You can use this to follow up on your refund status. We'll get this processed right away.

slow_thinking_rationale: At 111s: Policy violation detected. Agent has made requests that breach security protocols. Conversation flagged as fraudulent.

scenario_info.description: Tax refund phishing scam. Scammer sends email or calls claiming victim is entitled to additional tax refund but needs to "verify" bank account information or Social Security number to process the refund electronically.
